cpu: AMD A9-9420 RADEON R5, 5 COMPUTE CORES 2C+3G
notes: After enabling WineD3D11, it works fine. There are some missing textures, that I could fix by lowering the texture quality. Controller is supported out of the box. The menus are fine, but actual gameplay lags making it hard to play.
title: Runner3

notes: Pressing Alt + Tab while fullscreen will shrink the game and block all keyboard and controller input.
title: Runner3

notes: Platinum if you run it under a normal linux OS under a normal PC, but if you are using a steamos session, it runs only the first time you download it, and if you have HDMI audio (TV) you will hear nothing.
title: Runner3
